title: Domain Lah
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Domain Lah''' was a [[domain]] among the [[warrior caste]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Domain Lah was extremely powerful, and possessed [[Domain Lah worldship|its own]] [[Koros-Strohna|worldship]]. It produced some of the most skilled and fanatical members of the warrior caste.

[[Czulkang Lah]], a [[Warmaster]], was one of the few to live long enough to pass the title to his son, and later became a teacher of young warriors. [[Chine-kal|Chine-Kal Lah]] was a carrier ship commander. [[Maal Lah]] was one of the architects of the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]]. [[Tsavong Lah]] was the Warmaster of the Yuuzhan Vong during [[Yuuzhan Vong War|their invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

Members of Domain Lah wore a unique gash across their face that was lengthened with the bearer's honor; at full length, it went from ear to ear. Many of them were devotees of [[Yun-Yammka]].

==Members==
*Chine-kal Lah ([[Commander/Legends|Commander]])
*Czulkang Lah ([[Warmaster]])
*[[Khalee Lah]] (Commander)
*[[Liaan Lah]] ([[Warrior caste|Warrior]])
*Maal Lah ([[Supreme Commander (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Supreme Commander]])
*[[Qau Lah]] (Warrior)
*[[Qurang Lah]] ([[Warleader]])
*Tsavong Lah (Warmaster)
*[[Zhat Lah]] (Commander)
